---
title: "Clubul Computer"
title-block-style: none
subtitle: "A community-driven technology club for all ages"
description: "Join Clubul Computer, a community-driven technology club offering programming workshops, meetups, and hands-on learning for all ages."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="m-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Clubul <span class="gr">Computer</span></h1>
    <p>A community-driven tech club. Learn, build, and share — all ages, all levels.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>What we do</h2>
    <p class="sub">Six programs for every interest and skill level.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-laptop"></i><h3>Workshops</h3><p>Python, web dev, JavaScript — beginner to advanced.</p><a href="https://www.clubul.computer/t/workshops" class="m-lk" target="_blank">Schedule</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-people"></i><h3>Tech Talks</h3><p>Industry speakers on open source, AI ethics, cybersecurity.</p><a href="https://www.clubul.computer/t/talks" class="m-lk" target="_blank">Browse talks</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-controller"></i><h3>Junior Club</h3><p>Game dev, robot programming, and digital storytelling for ages 8-14.</p><a href="https://www.clubul.computer/t/junior" class="m-lk" target="_blank">Learn more</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-gear"></i><h3>Hardware Hacking</h3><p>Arduino, Raspberry Pi, IoT devices, and 3D printing.</p><a href="https://www.clubul.computer/t/hacking" class="m-lk" target="_blank">See projects</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-code-slash"></i><h3>Open Source</h3><p>Find projects, understand codebases, make real contributions.</p><a href="https://www.clubul.computer/t/open-source" class="m-lk" target="_blank">Join session</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-rocket"></i><h3>Project Incubator</h3><p>Turn your idea into reality with mentorship and resources.</p><a href="https://www.clubul.computer/t/incubator" class="m-lk" target="_blank">Submit idea</a></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-ri"><img src="/assets/images/stock/hackathon-team.jpg" alt="Club meetup"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Technology for<br>everyone.</h2>
        <p>No fees. No requirements. Just show up. Whether you're 8 or 80, a complete beginner or a senior developer — Clubul Computer is your space to learn, experiment, and connect with people who share your curiosity.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="https://clubul.computer" target="_blank" class="m-lk">Visit clubul.computer</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r rv">
      <div class="m-ri"><img src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.jpg" alt="Coding session"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Real projects.<br>Real impact.</h2>
        <p>Our members build educational tools used in 150+ Romanian schools, deploy air quality sensors across cities, and contribute to open-source projects used worldwide. This isn't a classroom — it's a launchpad.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="https://www.clubul.computer/t/open-source" target="_blank" class="m-lk">See community projects</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-n">
      <div><div class="m-nn">150+</div><div class="m-nl">Schools reached</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">5000+</div><div class="m-nl">Students</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">25</div><div class="m-nl">IoT sensors deployed</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">0</div><div class="m-nl">Membership fee</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container" style="max-width: 600px;">
    <h2>Find us</h2>
    <p class="sub"></p>
    <div style="text-align:center; color: var(--g); font-size: 1rem; line-height: 2;">
      <p><strong>Main location:</strong> Craiova, Romania</p>
      <p><strong>Satellite meetups:</strong> Bucharest (quarterly) + Online</p>
      <p><strong>Email:</strong> <a href="mailto:social@clubul.computer" class="m-lk" style="font-size:1rem;">social@clubul.computer</a></p>
      <p><strong>When:</strong> Last Thursday of every month</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Join the club</h2>
    <p>Show up to a meetup or reach out online. That's it.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:1rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="https://clubul.computer" target="_blank" class="m-b">Visit clubul.computer</a>
      <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="m-bo">Book a call</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
